title: guettarda calyptrata var. ferruginea
intro: Guettarda calyptrata var. ferruginea, also known as the Guettarda or Iron-wood tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal agent, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and combat infections. The health benefits of Guettarda calyptrata var. ferruginea include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Guettarda calyptrata var. ferruginea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat a range of health issues, including arthritis, hypertension, and respiratory problems.
